_comment: Config for the agent-guided variant. Copy to config.json and fill in. Secrets stay in environment variables (referenced by name), never in this file. Bucket percentages are for DISPLAY in the prompt only — the Sequence allocation rule does the real split + rounding. Amounts are integer cents. A preset may list MULTIPLE ruleIds; the runner fires each, dry-runs each, and reports per-rule failures.

chat._surfaceNote: 'slack' or 'whatsapp'. For Slack set SLACK_BOT_TOKEN; for WhatsApp set the Twilio env vars and a target number.

state._comment: Operational run-state — keep it LOCAL, do not depend on a SaaS store. Tracks each deposit's status (pending / allocated) for dedupe + re-surfacing.
